llm_score_rationale: The claims do not meaningfully answer the objective about corporate liability for vendor-caused breaches. Key problems: (1) Supporting excerpts (warranty, misrepresentation, UCC §2-313) are not on point to vendor/data-breach liability or duty/proximate-cause questions; they do not constitute controlling statutes, binding appellate precedent, or regulator decisions about data-security obligations. (2) c002 (the most directly relevant claim listing follow-up legal questions) has no supporting auth
